consumerTone: plain English; educational strength-and-aging context only; no longevity, frailty, training, injury, recovery, or medical claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: calibrated strength score, biological-age model, longevity model, frailty model, muscle-loss model, recovery model, injury-risk model, training-response model, and ancestry applicability metadata unavailable in this fixture

inputManifest.source: synthetic derived fitness-trait evidence for age-strength validation

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable strength, aging, bone-density, osteoporosis, fracture-risk, frailty, recovery, injury-risk, supplement, treatment, exercise-clearance, and calibrated models explicitly. Use sibling Gene-In-Form sample rows only as observed output-format examples; do not infer bone strength, osteoporosis risk, fracture risk, exercise plan, supplement need, treatment need, medical outcome, or sample-only training actions from genotype alone.

referenceResources.title: NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores
Gene-In-Form Personalized Fitness sibling sample report

reportPurpose: Consumer strength and aging fitness context using derived ACTN3 and ACE evidence plus sibling Gene-In-Form strength, recovery, connective-tissue, and musculoskeletal output-structure evidence.
